sklearn.reason: target_tool: KMeans clustering, PCA dimensionality reduction, StandardScaler preprocessing — all load-bearing for this isolation probe.

CAN: PCA for variance decomposition and dimensionality reduction
silhouette score for cluster quality assessment
CANNOT: replace gudhi for persistent homology / TDA
non-commutative geometry or Clifford algebra operations

B_pca_positive.note: 10D data, PCA(n_components=3), top-3 components explain >50% of variance

C_scaler_positive.note: StandardScaler fit+transform: mean≈0, std≈1 per feature

A_clustering_negative.note: All-same-point data: KMeans(n_clusters=2) produces degenerate labels, silhouette ≤ 0 or undefined

B_pca_negative.error: n_components=11 must be between 0 and min(n_samples, n_features)=10 with svd_solver='full'
B_pca_negative.note: PCA(n_components=11) on 10D data correctly raises ValueError

C_scaler_negative.note: Scaler fitted on train: transforming different-scale test data does NOT yield mean≈0

B_pca_boundary.note: PCA(n_components=10) on 10D data: all variance explained (sum≈1.0)

C_scaler_boundary.note: StandardScaler on 1-sample data: std=0 handled (no crash); output is zero-mean
